criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on various app stores and platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, and other relevant platforms.

criteria.name: Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs across all platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, and other relevant platforms.

criteria.name: Active Users
criteria.description: Number of active users on a monthly or daily basis.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, company reports, and industry analyses.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and depth of features offered by the app, including AI capabilities.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and intuitiveness of the app's user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert analyses, and design awards.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Degree of innovation and unique features brought by the app to the market.
criteria.sources: Industry analyses, tech blogs, and innovation awards.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other apps, services, and platforms.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and integration directories.

criteria.name: AI Functionality
criteria.description: Effectiveness and variety of AI-powered features within the app.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance of the app across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and compatibility tests.

criteria.name: Security and Privacy
criteria.description: Strength of security measures and privacy protections offered by the app.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and security audits.
